sources.title: CB Insights: Fintech Funding Trends Q3 2024
Crunchbase: Series B Fintech Round Analysis

result.summary: Series B fintech funding in 2024 has reset to 2019 levels with median round sizes of $28M at 12-15x ARR multiples, favoring profitable or near-profitable companies with clear paths to unit economics over high-growth, high-burn models.
key_findings: Median Series B round size dropped to $28M from $45M peak in 2021, with 40% fewer deals closed YoY as investors demand $5M+ ARR and positive unit economics
Embedded finance and B2B payments are the most funded subsectors, capturing 35% of all Series B fintech dollars, while consumer neobanking fell to just 8%
Time between Series A and B extended to 26 months median (from 18 months in 2021), with 62% of 2022 Series A companies still not having raised follow-on rounds
